retry_reason: refcount_inc always succeeds; there is no failure case to retry.
contract_summary: This is an acquire (get) wrapper that unconditionally increments the reference count of the global structure `prog_test_struct` via `refcount_inc`. It returns a pointer to that structure, giving the caller a new reference. The caller must later release this reference by calling a corresponding put function (e.g., `bpf_kfunc_call_test_release`). The operation always succeeds and the returned pointer is always valid; there is no error path and no need to check the return value.
